data.title: SR Bancorp, Inc. corrects Q4 & annual financial results, reporting net income of $2.2 million for Q4 & $5.1 million for the year, assets of $1.08 billion, loans $797.2 million, deposits $846 million. Company also experienced an increase in interest income, noninterest income, and decrease in noninterest expense. More details available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: SR Bancorp, Inc., the holding company for Somerset Regal Bank, issued a corrected press release on Sept. 12, 2025, revealing financial results for the quarter and year ended June 30, 2025. They recognized $1.5 million gains from life insurance and adjusted credit loss allowances, resulting in revised figures: Provision for credit losses increased from $81 to $238 for the quarter and from a negative $24 to $133 for the year. Net income rose from $823 to $2,212 for the quarter and from $3,747 to $5,136 for the year. Total assets increased by 6.2%, with loans up by 8.9% and deposits increasing by 4.8% from the previous year. Noninterest income jumped by 152.2%, and noninterest expense rose by 3.3%. The Bank reported a provision for credit losses of $238,000 for the quarter and $133,000 for the year, with a non-performing loan value reduction from $50,000 to $0 year-over-year. Total assets were $1.08 billion, with net loans at $797.2 million, deposits at $846.0 million, and total equity at $193.8 million at June 30, 2025. The Bank saw the net interest income rise from $29.4 million to $29.6 million year-over-year, along with a $210,000 increase in the margin. The provision for credit losses decreased from $4.1 million to $133,000 year-over-year, adjusted due to revised quantitative loss factors. The Bank's net income stood at $5.1 million, up from a net loss of $10.9 million in the previous year. UIAlertificant increases in interest income, noninterest income, net interest income, and net income attributed to distinct gains and adjustments throughout the year.

data.title: KB Home opens Belcourt Place in El Monte, CA with modern homes for today's living. nyse: KBH.
data.description: In El Monte, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled Belcourt Place, a new-home community catering to modern living. Situated in a vibrant city known for its cultural richness and family-friendly activities, the homes offer contemporary designs with spacious great rooms and modern kitchens. El Monte provides a dynamic mix of dining, shopping, and entertainment options, making it an appealing location for potential homeowners. With KB Home's reputation as one of the leading homebuilders in the U.S., the grand opening of Belcourt Place introduces a new housing option in this desirable area.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics granted stock options to a new employee under Nasdaq Rule, improving patient lives with rare diseases.
data.description: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Cambridge, Mass., announced on Sept. 12, 2025, that they have granted non-statutory stock options to a new employee. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FULC, focuses on developing small molecules to help patients with rare genetic diseases. The stock options were granted under the company's 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan as part of the new employee agreement, complying with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This move aims to enhance the employee's engagement and align their interests with the company's success.

data.title: Ten-League International Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: TLIH) faces Nasdaq deficiency for not meeting $1.00 minimum bid price per share.
data.description: Singapore-based company Ten-League International Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: TLIH) received a deficiency notice from Nasdaq on September 9, 2025. The notice stated that the company did not meet the minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share for its ordinary shares over the 30 consecutive business days from July 25, 2025, to September 8, 2025. This puts the company at risk of losing its listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2).

data.title: Global Uranium Corp. hired Danayi Capital for marketing services for 30 days starting September 26, 2025 in Calgary.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 12, 2025, Global Uranium Corp. (CSE: GURN | FRA: Q3J) has announced a partnership with Danayi Capital Corp. for marketing services. The agreement, set to begin on September 26, 2025, will last for an estimated 30 days or until budget limits are reached. The cooperation may be extended or shortened as per management's decision. Contact information for Danayi Capital Corp.: Address - 550-800 West Pender Street Vancouver, BC, V6C 1J8; Email - Mehran@danayi.co.

data.title: byNordic Acquisition Corp extends business combination deadline by 1 month after depositing $17,470 into Trust Account.
data.description: A special purpose acquisition company, byNordic Acquisition Corporation (BYNO), based in New York City, deposited $17,470 into its trust account to extend the deadline for completing a business combination. The extension grants an additional one-month period, from September 12, 2025, to October 12, 2025. This move is the second extension out of a possible total of twelve allowed under the amended certificate of incorporation dated August 8, 2025. The board of directors of BYNO has the authority to extend the termination date by one month consecutively without requiring further shareholder approval until August 12, 2026, or the completion of the company's initial business combination.

data.title: Faraday Future plans to spin off its crypto assets into a listed company for fundraising and operations, looking to build a dual-listed company structure. More details to be shared at the upcoming 919 event.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. revealed its plans to separate its crypto flywheel assets through a spin-off into a currently listed company. Faraday Future, a California-headquartered company specializing in global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystems, made this announcement. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FFAI, anticipates sharing more information about this development during the upcoming 919 event. This move showcases the company’s strategic approach towards its crypto assets and signifies a step towards potential growth and diversification.

data.title: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) CFO to talk at Wells Fargo 8th Consumer Conference on Sep 16, 2025, at 10:15 am PT. Webcast at investors.levistrauss.com.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) shared that Harmit Singh, their chief financial and growth officer, will be partaking in a fireside chat at the Wells Fargo 8th Annual Consumer Conference on Tuesday, September 16, 2025, starting at 10:15 a.m. Pacific time. Those interested can access a live webcast of the event on the Company’s Investor Relations website at http://investors.levistrauss.com. Furthermore, a replay of the webcast will be accessible at the same link after the live session concludes.

data.title: Ares Acquisition Corp II (NYSE: AACT) reminds shareholders to vote on business combination with Kodiak Robotics by Sept 23.
data.description: Ares Acquisition Corporation II (NYSE: AACT) is urging its shareholders to vote in favor of the proposed business combination with Kodiak Robotics, Inc. (Legacy Kodiak), a top AI-powered autonomous vehicle technology provider. The pairing aims to address challenging driving tasks. Following the completion of the proposed business merger, AACT's securities will be delisted from the Ne, with important numbers including the stock ticker (NYSE: AACT).

data.title: Planet Labs PBC closes upsized $460M offering of 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030. CFO notes business sustainability.
data.description: Planet Labs PBC (NYSE:PL) in San Francisco recently closed a deal for $460,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030. This amount includes the full exercise of the option given to the initial purchasers to buy up to $60,000,000 aggregate principal amount of notes. Ashley Johnson, the CFO and President of Planet, expressed that the completion of this offering marks progress in establishing a lasting and influential business for years to come.

data.title: Omega Flex, Inc. declares $0.34 per share dividend for Q3 2025 to be paid on Oct 8, 2025 to shareholders on record as of Sept 25, 2025.
data.description: Exton, Pennsylvania, on September 12, 2025 - Omega Flex, Inc. (NASDAQ: OFLX) announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share. This dividend will be paid on October 8, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of September 25, 2025. The Board of Directors will assess the company's cash requirements, financial standing, capital investment strategies, potential acquisitions, and other pertinent factors to determine future dividend amounts on a quarterly basis.

data.title: Celebrity gym influencer Martyn slapped a crypto developer, boosting his earnings by $49,000 with Solana meme token.
data.description: Bodybuilder and fitness influencer Bradley Martyn physically hit a developer of the Solana meme coin, resulting in the developer receiving approximately $49,000 worth of cryptocurrency. The incident occurred due to reasons that have been detailed.

data.title: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) to discuss financial results and business update in conference call on Sept. 16, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: A company based in Rochester, New York called Syntec Optics, which specializes in providing vital optics to a range of industries like defense, biomedical, communications, and consumer markets, will be hosting a conference call on September 16, 2025. The call, scheduled for 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, aims to discuss the company's financial performance and offer a general business update. This event is significant for stakeholders and those interested in the company's operations.

data.title: Nasdaq hits new level as Opendoor jumps 79%, Dow struggles. Shopify falls after executive loss.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average struggled to recover from losses. Shopify shares declined following the departure of a crucial executive. In today's stock market, the Nasdaq reached a new high. Additionally, Opendoor's stock surged by 79%, with ongoing live coverage of the market developments provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fortrea grants 75,000 RSUs to new employee per Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4), vesting annually starting Sep 12, 2026.
data.description: Fortrea, a prominent global contract research organization traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FTRE, announced on September 12, 2025, the granting of an inducement award to a newly hired employee. The award comprises 75,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) that will vest in three equal annual portions beginning September 12, 2026, contingent upon the employee's continuous tenure with the company until each vesting date. The RSUs are governed by Fortrea's Amended and Restated 2025 Inducement Award Plan and the respective award agreements. This action aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and serves as a significant inducement for the individual to join the company.
